title: begonia oxyloba
intro: Begonia oxyloba, also known as Begonia, is a plant species within the Begoniaceae family. It is a shrub-like perennial that is native to tropical regions of the Americas, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The leaves and roots of Begonia oxyloba contain alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been used to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Begonia oxyloba is often used as a tea or infusion, or as an ingredient in tinctures and salves, to promote wound healing and relieve symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
